traits.name: Brave
traits.description: You have advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Frightened condition.

traits.name: Halfling Nimbleness
traits.description: You can move through the space of any creature larger than you.

traits.name: Luck
traits.description: When you roll a 1 on the d20 of a d20 Test, you can reroll and must use the new roll.

traits.name: Naturally Stealthy
traits.description: You can take the Hide action even when obscured only by a creature at least one size larger.
